renderQueue.title: Render queue
renderQueue.description: Queued exports render one at a time and save to your workspace exports folder.
renderQueue.addedToast_one: Added {{count}} job to the render queue
renderQueue.addedToast_other: Added {{count}} jobs to the render queue
renderQueue.noMarkers: Add markers to the timeline to split by marker.
renderQueue.nothingToRender: Nothing to render in this range.
renderQueue.buildFailed: Couldn't add to the render queue.
renderQueue.empty: No render jobs yet. Add one from the Export dialog.
renderQueue.exportsLocation: The files can be found in this project's local folder ({{folder}}).
renderQueue.exportsLocationGeneric: The files can be found in this project's local folder in your workspace.
renderQueue.paused: Queue paused — resume to keep rendering.
renderQueue.missingFile: File not found — it may have been moved or deleted.
